description: The US-Iran standoff in the Strait of Hormuz remains unresolved just days before the ceasefire deadline, with tensions rising again after Iran rejected claims by US President Donald Trump that it had agreed to major concessions. Women quota bill fails in Lok Sabha: Strategic move or poor planning?
description: For the first time since 2014, the Modi government failed to pass a bill in Parliament, a move analysts suggest was strategic. By forcing a vote on the women's reservation bill, linked to delimitation, the BJP aimed to record every MP's stance, creating a potent campaign tool. The government positioned itself as pro-women reformists, while blaming opposition parties for obstructing progress. This tactic seeks to shape the political narrative ahead of crucial elections, highlighting intent versus obstruction.

OpenAI exec Srinivas Narayanan leaves to spend time with ageing parents in India
description: Srinivas Narayanan, OpenAI's CTO for B2B applications, is departing the company next week after nearly three years. He plans to visit his parents in India before considering future professional endeavors. Narayanan, who previously served as VP of Engineering, shared his departure on LinkedIn, calling his tenure at the AI firm 'three incredible years'.

Josh Allen, Hailee Steinfeld glow after welcoming first child
description: NFL star Josh Allen and actress Hailee Steinfeld welcomed their baby daughter, sharing the joyous news on Thursday. Just a day later, the new parents made a dazzling appearance at Josh's best friend Sam Darnold's wedding. The couple, radiating happiness, celebrated with fellow NFL players, even sharing baby photos, proving they can balance new parenthood with social commitments.

title: Dianna Russini–Mike Vrabel drama: Husband dragged into affair row
description: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and the former New York Times’ reporter and insider, Dianna Russini, continue to be a topic of discussion as their alleged affair rumors swirl now. While Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini have denied affair rumors, things have gotten worse as the popular NFL insider stepped down from her job at The Athletic. Amid this, there has been a new allegation against them.

title: Microsoft’s & Apple’s coding tools will be ‘dead soon,': Creator of Antrophic's AI coding tool
description: Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, predicts traditional coding tools like VS Code and Xcode will soon be obsolete. He believes AI agents will soon handle entire development workflows, rendering current IDEs unnecessary. This shift will redefine software engineers into 'builders' who orchestrate AI, requiring adaptability and early experimentation from professionals.

title: Floyd Mayweather Jr: $100K lawsuit after $7M tax debt before Pacquiao bout
description: Boxing legend Floyd Mayweather Jr is once again in legal trouble after a company accused him of not paying for private jet services. A complaint filed in Los Angeles County claims that Jet Set Aircraft Inc. is owed more than $105,000. The case is linked to a private charter flight in 2025. The lawsuit also names Mayweather’s company, TBE Aviation, and other individuals who were allegedly involved in arranging the trip.
